name: Picante Catsup
recipeIngredient: 8 pounds Tomatoes, peeled, seeded, and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Use this piquant version in place of regular catsup to spice up sandwiches, meatloaf, or hamburgers.
2. Since this catsup freezes well, it is a great way to use all those fresh tomatoes.
3. Cook the tomatoes for 15 minutes and then drain off the excess liquid.
4. Add the celery, onion, bell pepper, and chiles and simmer for 1 1/2 hours, or until reduced by one half.
5. Add the sugar, vinegar, and spices and simmer for an additional hour.
6. Remove from heat and puree until smooth.
7. Pack into freezer containers, leaving 1/2 inch headspace, and freeze. Makes 4 pints.
